title: Common Error
description: Common v1 error object for stable error codes, safe messages, and trace references.
$comment: Source: docs/error-code-standard.md requires stable namespaced error codes, descriptions, optional HTTP status, and examples before production use.

code.description: Stable namespaced error code from error-codes/*.yaml.

message.description: Safe human-readable message. Do not include secrets, stack traces, or sensitive data.

httpStatus.description: HTTP status when the error is returned by an HTTP API.

details.description: Optional safe validation or blocking details.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID used to trace the failed flow.

auditId.description: Audit ID when the failed or denied action must be audited.
